mapper.select: select id, openid, stock_id as stockId, code, name, market, strategy, entry_price as entryPrice, resonance, summary, tags_json as tagsJson, added_at as addedAt from user_watchlist where openid = #{openid} order by added_at desc

select id, openid, stock_id as stockId, code, name, market, strategy, entry_price as entryPrice, resonance, summary, tags_json as tagsJson, added_at as addedAt from user_watchlist where openid = #{openid} and stock_id = #{stockId}
mapper.delete: delete from user_watchlist where openid = #{openid} and stock_id = #{stockId}
